description:

title: Indiana Chamber, Aspire Johnson County partner on work-based learning efforts
description: The partnership unites the employer outreach efforts of the Johnson County economic development organization with Work and Learn Indiana, a program of the Indiana Chamber of Commerce’s Institute for Workforce Excellence.

title: Recount hearing set for July 28 in 3-vote race from May’s Republican primary
description:

title: Subaru issues recall for 541,000 SUVs over label with incorrect weight rating
description:

title: Copperworks details $32 million expansion in New Haven
description:

title: Indiana Chamber unveils updated Prosperity 2035 plan, narrows to 18 goals
